{{Infobox event
| name = Spiritual Origin test
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Spiritual Origin test is a semi-annual ritual conducted by the clans of [[Sacred Valley]]. During this event, children between the ages of six and eight are evaluated by clan elders to reveal their spiritual nature. Participants typically wear formal attire, such as layered robes for boys or silk wraps for girls, while their families observe the proceedings with anticipation. Although the test is a celebrated tradition within the valley, it has been described as a deceptive practice that utilizes a bowl of liquid [[madra]]. Rather than revealing an individual's ultimate potential, the test merely identifies a person's starting point or primary talent. For example, being identified as a [[Forger]] indicates a specific beginning, though it implies a more difficult path toward becoming an [[Enforcer]]. Outside of the valley's influence, true [[sacred artists]] are expected to master all four disciplines and harvest a [[Remnant]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Spiritual Origin test]] is a biannual event for children in [[Sacred Valley]] to determine the nature of their spirits.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Spiritual Origin test]] involves children dipping their hands into a bowl of purified and distilled [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Spiritual Origin test]] is a tool used to see where one is going to begin.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39">''Waybound'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Spiritual Origin test]] involves a bowl that is filled with a blue-white transparent liquid.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Spiritual Origin test]] is used to help understand who one is.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c39" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
